name: Little Gasser

abilities.name: Demise (Worst Piñata Ever)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, enemy models and other Little Gassers within (r)2" are dealt 1 damage and gain a Poison token.

abilities.name: Drag Behind
abilities.text: Once per turn. Before this model moves, it may remove a marker within 2" of it. After resolving the move, make a marker of the same type into base contact with this model.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

actions.name: Corpse Bloat
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a Remains marker. Enemy models within (aura)1" of the target must pass a TN 10 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage. Then, remove the target.

triggers.name: Evil Winds
triggers.text: Models that fail this duel gain a Poison token.

actions.name: Pull My Finger
actions.effects: Enemy models within range must pass a TN 10 Wp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

extraction_notes: STN: 4 appears below the artwork - appears to be a station number or similar identifier
